zh.lifeSummary: 當Phebe Richardson於1632年6月3日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓時，她的父親Ezekiel Richardson28歲，母親Susannah18歲。她於1649年11月1日與Henry Baldwin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1716年9月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年84歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phebe Richardson于1632年6月3日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓时，她的父亲Ezekiel Richardson28岁，母亲Susannah18岁。她于1649年11月1日与Henry Baldwin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1716年9月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年84岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave seen in memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When Phebe Richardson was born on 3 June 1632, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Ezekiel Richardson, was 28 and her mother, Susannah, was 18. She married Henry Baldwin on 1 November 1649, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 13 September 1716, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 84, and was buried in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phebe Richardson est née le 3 juin 1632, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Ezekiel Richardson, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Susannah, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Baldwin le 1 novembre 1649, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 septembre 1716, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phebe Richardson am 3. Juni 1632 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ezekiel Richardson 28 und ihre Mutter Susannah 18. Sie hat am 1. November 1649 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Henry Baldwin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. September 1716 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phebe Richardson è nata il il 3 giugno 1632 nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Ezekiel Richardson, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Susannah, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Henry Baldwin il 1 novembre 1649, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 13 settembre 1716, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Phebe Richardsonが1632年6月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンで生まれた時，父Ezekiel Richardsonは28歳，母Susannahは18歳であった。1649年11月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでHenry Baldwinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1716年9月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで84歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスウオブルンフィルスト ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Phebe Richardson(이)가 1632년 6월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ezekiel Richardson(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susannah(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1649년 11월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Henry Baldwin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1716년 9월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phebe Richardson nasceu em 3 de junho de 1632, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Ezekiel Richardson, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Susannah, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Baldwin em 1 de novembro de 1649, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1716, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phebe Richardson родилась 3 июня 1632 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Ezekiel Richardson было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Susannah, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Baldwin 1 ноября 1649 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 13 сентября 1716 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности фирст буряль гроунд, вобурн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phebe Richardson nació el 3 de junio de 1632, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Ezekiel Richardson, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Susannah, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Henry Baldwin el 1 de noviembre de 1649, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1716, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
